---
name: Documentation
about: Improve or add documentation
labels: documentation
---

### Summary
- What docs were added/changed and why?

### Changes
- Key files/sections updated

### Screenshots (optional)
- Before/after for README, guides, or site content

### Linked Issues
- Closes #

### Checklist
- [ ] Grammar/spelling checked
- [ ] Links verified (internal/external)
- [ ] Updated any references in README/CONTRIBUTING as needed
